name: com.magi.ledgeboardgame
description: Reusable Ledge mechanics library (board, TokenStack, adjacency, rules, movement, behavior-tree ordering) consumed by sibling Magi Unity projects (e.g. cardcore) as a local UPM package via a `file:` reference to this folder. DO NOT DELETE: this `package.json` must stay colocated with `Magi.LedgeBoardGame.asmdef` at the package root, or dependent projects fail to resolve with `The file [...]/package.json cannot be found`. This repo also opens this folder as an in-project asmdef in its own Unity editor; both uses are intentional.
